summary: Step 7 GLOBAL THEME OVERHAUL + Home layout fix PASSED end-to-end on 390x844 mobile viewport. Frontend-only testing (backend skipped per request). Home (roommates-screen): deep teal background rgb(8,61,74)=#083D4A confirmed; brand 'Roomie' white + 'Swipe' orange rendered; full-width 'Roomate Preferences' filter pill (filter-open-button) bg=rgb(139,180,185)=#8BB4B9; tapping it opens FilterSheet (filter-sheet-title visible) and Female+Apply updates the deck. Swipe card shows photo/name/age/uni and two orange pills (Female + €650/mo); like-button & nope-button are 64x64 perfect orange circles (rgb(224,122,47)=#E07A2F) with dark icons — geometry on 390x844: card bottom=664, action top=680 (16px gap), action bottom=744, tab-bar top=768 (24px gap), so ZERO overlap between card/actions/tab-bar. Like-button advanced deck (Sofia→Emma) and Sofia appeared in Matches screen. Bottom tab bar (bottom-tab-bar) inner pill bg=muted teal #8BB4B9; active tab iconPill is a 48x48 perfect circle (borderRadius=999px) with orange bg & dark icon, confirmed on both tab-roommates and tab-profile. Tab navigation works to matches/apartments/profile (all on deep-teal bg). Edit profile row (setting-'Edit profile') navigates to /edit-profile (deep teal bg + orange Add Photos / Complete Profile CTAs). Roomie Profile row opens /roomie-profile quiz with deep teal bg. No white panels, no neon-green leftover bg, contrast is readable across screens. Only console noise = pre-existing RN-web deprecation warnings ('shadow*'/'pointerEvents' from SwipeDeck/roommates styles) — cosmetic, carried over from previous iterations, non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Originates from action-button shadow styles in roommates.tsx and from SwipeDeck pointerEvents prop. Cosmetic on web, not a blocker. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/roommates.tsx:128-132 (shadow*), /app/frontend/src/components/SwipeDeck.tsx:177 (pointerEvents='none').

action_items: (Optional, low-pri) Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow and pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents to silence RN-web deprecation warnings.
(Optional, out-of-scope cosmetic) /app/frontend/app/delete-account.tsx still hardcodes backgroundColor #1C1C1C — fine on its own, but consider tying to colors.surfaceInverse for theme consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: theme/index.ts cleanly centralizes the new palette (surface=#083D4A, muted=#8BB4B9, brand=#E07A2F, onBrand=#0A0A0A) — all consumed via tokens, no hex bleed into screen styles (verified via grep, only delete-account.tsx has one legacy hex).

roommates.tsx layout uses a static spacer `height: TAB_BAR_SPACE + insets.bottom` (84px + insets) which gives the action buttons their gap above the absolutely-positioned tab bar — works on 390x844, but worth confirming on shorter devices (e.g., 360x640) since the card area uses flex:1 and a fixed 64+padding action row.
GlassTabBar's active tab is a perfect 48x48 circle with borderRadius 999 — matches spec; inactive icons use a hardcoded color '#0A3A45' instead of a theme token (minor).
SwipeDeck still uses pointerEvents prop (line 177) and roommates.tsx still uses shadow* style props — sources of the RN-web deprecation warnings noted above.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified testIDs in play: roommates-screen, filter-open-button, filter-sheet-title, filter-gender-Female, filter-apply-button, swipe-card-top, like-button, nope-button, bottom-tab-bar, tab-roommates/tab-matches/tab-apartments/tab-profile, profile-screen, roomie-profile-row, 'setting-Edit profile' (NOTE the space, matches label). Geometry assertions on 390x844: card={x:16,y:113,w:358,h:551}, nope={x:119,y:680,w:64,h:64}, like={x:207,y:680,w:64,h:64}, tabbar={x:16,y:768,w:358,h:76}. Active tab iconPill is 48x48 circle (br=999). No backend regressions expected — this iteration was theme/layout only.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all theme + layout-overlap checks passed.
